question.label: First move
question.name: What's the first concrete thing you want to do before we next meet?
question.description: Closes on a specific commitment that turns the growth conversation into an action plan.

assessment.note: [SKIP] no signal — planner bypassed, queue carried forward

new_queue.label: First focus
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, where do you want to focus first?

history.answer_excerpt: If we define two concrete leadership bets for this half, I can commit fully.
I want milestones that show progress before the next cycle, not only retrospective feedback.
Sometimes I avoid high-ambiguity forums because I do not want to sound underprepared.
I think I need to own a cross-org decision area, not just deliver strong design outcomes.
If we define two concrete leadership bets for this half, I can commit fully.
I want milestones that show progress before the next cycle, not only retrospective feedback.
I am still motivated, but the promotion outcome made me more careful about where I spend political capital.
I want milestones that show progress before the next cycle, not only retrospective feedback.
I am still motivated, but the promotion outcome made me more careful about where I spend political capital.
I can lead major initiatives, but I do not always translate that into visible strategic influence.
I get positive feedback on craft and collaboration, but less clarity on what separates me at the next level.
Sometimes I avoid high-ambiguity forums because I do not want to sound underprepared.
I think I need to own a cross-org decision area, not just deliver strong design outcomes.
I also need clearer sponsorship in rooms where priorities are set.
If we define two concrete leadership bets for this half, I can commit fully.
